jobs: - Built a Medical RAG Chatbot using LangChain, Groq, and Pinecone to answer clinical questions with grounded context from vector search.
- Designed an autonomous AI agent that selects tools, handles failures with retry logic, and explains reasoning using FastAPI, Pydantic, and LangChain.
- Optimized Pinecone retrieval quality with fine-tuned Sentence Transformer embeddings to improve response relevance for end users.
- Led insurance products end to end: delivered the React/Redux mRec platform for Axis Max Life and stabilized ABHI mobile app state issues behind major crashes.
- Built a Jest-based regression test suite that raised release confidence and maintained consistent behavior for AI feature rollouts.
- Achiever of the Month (March 2026) for shipping two high-impact AI features recognized by leadership.

designation: React Native Engineer (Client Project - via Monocept)
